{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Holy Wind
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Holy Wind]] is represented by an old woman in gray.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Holy Wind]] is a school that young geniuses from clans might attend.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c16">''Unsouled'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
